name: arkspace
title: ARKSpace
description: Complete coworking space management with bookings, memberships, CRM, contracts, training, and billing — natively integrated with ERPNext.
long_description: ARKSpace is a comprehensive coworking and shared-space management application built natively on the Frappe Framework with deep ERPNext integration. Manage 6 space types with interactive floor plans, smart bookings, membership plans with credit wallets, CRM pipeline, bilingual contracts, training modules with gamification, and automated billing — all in one unified platform.
author: ARKSpace Team
features: Space management with 6 types and interactive floor plans
Smart booking engine with auto check-in/out and no-show detection
Membership platform with credit wallets and auto-renewal
Built-in CRM with lead pipeline and tour scheduling
Contract management with bilingual Jinja templates
Training and community with badges and gamification
Full Arabic and English support (700+ translations)

screenshots.caption: Dashboard with number cards and analytics charts
Interactive floor plan with color-coded space status
Space booking form with availability checking
CRM pipeline with lead tracking and tour scheduling
